content:
# Wavelet Transformation

**Summary**: A mathematical tool used to decompose signals into different frequency components and identify features like noise, trends, and discontinuities.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2013-mehmood|Mehmood, 2013]] used wavelet transformation to reduce the data and model spaces in a 2Dwp-wk approach for history matching.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Wavelet transform can be used to denoise and scale-up permeability data, as well as to identify local discontinuities. ([[2013-mehmood|Mehmood, 2013, p. 43]])
